mapper.select: select card.name , htb.id as batch_id, hted.hsc_id, htb.create_time, htb.create_by from hlvr_te_batch htb join hlvr_training_exam_detail hted on htb.hted_id = hted.id join hlvr_sop_card card on hted.hsc_id = card.id where hted_id in ( select id from hlvr_training_exam_detail hted where hted.ht_id = #{hteId} ) ORDER BY htb.create_time desc

select id as batchId, htb.create_time, (select sum(score) from hlvr_sop_card_step_opt_history hscsoh where hscsoh.batch_id =htb.id and hscsoh.del_flag = 0) as total_score, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, create_time, end_time) AS cost_time from hlvr_te_batch htb where htb.del_flag = 0 and htb.hte_id = #{id} and create_by = #{createBy} order by create_time DESC

select hscsoh.create_time, hscsoh.step_name as groupName, hscsoh.opt_content as optContent, hscsoh.score, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, hscsoh.create_time, hscsoh.end_time) AS cost_time from hlvr_sop_card_step_opt_history hscsoh where batch_id=#{batchId} and hscsoh.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time

select hscso.hscsg_id, hscsg.group_name,hscso.opt_content from hlvr_sop_card_step_group hscsg LEFT JOIN hlvr_sop_card_step_opt hscso ON hscso.hscsg_id=hscsg.id where hsc_id=#{hscId} and hscsg.del_flag = 0 and hscso.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY hscsg.indexing, hscso.indexing

with temp as ( SELECT hte_id, COUNT(*) AS num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MAX(htb.update_time) DESC) AS RowNum, hte.name FROM hlvr_te_batch htb left join hlvr_training_exam hte on htb.hte_id = hte.id WHERE htb.del_flag = 0 and htb.create_by= #{createBy} GROUP BY hte_id,hte.name ) SELECT * FROM temp WHERE RowNum BETWEEN ((#{current} -1) * #{size} + 1 ) AND (#{current} * #{size})
SELECT count(hte_id) FROM hlvr_te_batch WHERE del_flag = 0 and create_by= #{createBy}
